sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current player position
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Player position:")
for r in range(28, 42):
    line = ascii_lines[r]
    if 'M' in line[10:20]:
        print(f"Row {r}: has M")

# Check current path length
print("\nPath area:")
for r in [32, 33]:
    line = ascii_lines[r]
    path_end = 0
    for c in range(17, 50):
        if line[c] in 'wg':
            path_end = c
    print(f"Row {r}: path ends at col {path_end}")

# Let me try shortening the path to col 42 (where blocks start)
# Current path ends at col 46, so I need 4 LEFT moves
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
